entities.name: CROP YIELD STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of crop production over time for farm households

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME VARIABILITY
entities.description: The degree of fluctuation in the total income received by farm households

entities.name: RESOURCE-POOR FARM HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Farm households characterized by limited access to productive resources

entities.name: INDIA'S SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The semi-arid tropical geographic regions of India

entities.name: YIELD VARIABILITY
entities.description: The measure of variation in crop yields across different periods or conditions

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETAL TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Agricultural technologies focused on developing improved crop varieties to reduce risk

entities.name: ECONOMIC VALUE
entities.description: The monetary or utility worth assigned to the risk-reducing attributes of agricultural technologies

relationships.description: The study examines the relationship between yield stability and income variability
Increased yield variability is unlikely to result in significantly high income variability
Technologies designed to provide risk-reducing attributes for resource-poor households
Little economic value is attached to the risk-reducing attributes of improved varietal technologies
Resource-poor farm households are located in India's semi-arid tropics
